title: Update tsk init for project/project-local directories
description: Replace bd init flow with creation of project/ directory and optional project-local/ directory with .gitignore entry. No database, config, or daemon artifacts.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Starting work. Plan: update tsk init behavior per project/project-local directories in both Python and Rust, adjust shared Gherkin specs and steps, run behavior suites and spec parity.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated init to create project/ with issues only, added optional --local, removed .taskulus.yaml/config/wiki artifacts. Switched discovery in steps to use project directories, default config now loads when config.yaml missing. Tests run: cd python && coverage run --source=taskulus -m behave && coverage report -m (100%), cd rust && cargo test --test cucumber, python tools/check_spec_parity.py.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Running tsk init creates project/ and optionally project-local/ with gitignore entry. No .beads/ or config files are created. Behavior is identical in Python and Rust.
